context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses the Python ElevenLabs SDK for generating looping ambient sounds, respects parameter constraints (duration range, prompt_influence range, model requirement for looping), and writes the streaming response correctly.

checklist.name: v2 model used with loop
checklist.description: Uses `model_id='eleven_text_to_sound_v2'` (or omits model_id, relying on the default) — does NOT specify an incompatible non-v2 model alongside loop=True

checklist.name: Valid duration value
checklist.description: If `duration_seconds` is specified, its value is within the range 0.5–30 (inclusive), or it is set to null/None for auto

checklist.name: Valid prompt_influence value
checklist.description: If `prompt_influence` is specified, its value is between 0 and 1 (inclusive)

checklist.name: Streaming chunk write
checklist.description: Saves audio by iterating over response chunks (e.g. `for chunk in audio: f.write(chunk)`) rather than writing a single non-iterated value

checklist.name: Descriptive prompt
checklist.description: The prompt passed to the API includes at least two descriptive elements (e.g. environment + sound source, texture + context)

checklist.name: Error handling present
checklist.description: API call is wrapped in a try/except block

checklist.name: Environment variable auth
checklist.description: Uses `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` environment variable (client created without a hardcoded key literal, or reads from os.environ)
